name: project-adoption
description: Run a POSIX-only, read-only audit before adopting Codex or Grok.

interface.shortDescription: Run a safe POSIX project-adoption audit.
interface.longDescription: On POSIX hosts, reports Claude-specific assumptions, coverage limits, and safe Codex or Grok adoption steps without changing the project.
interface.defaultPrompt: On a POSIX host, audit this project read-only for Codex and Grok adoption.
